mapper.select: select id, shop_notice_id, file_url, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from shop_notice_file where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, shop_notice_id, file_url,file_name from shop_notice_file where shop_notice_id = #{shopNoticeId}
mapper.insert: insert into shop_notice_file(id, shop_notice_id, file_url, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{shopNoticeId}, #{fileUrl}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into shop_notice_file(id,shop_notice_id, file_url,file_name, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.shopNoticeId}, #{entity.fileUrl}, #{entity.fileName}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into shop_notice_file(id,shop_notice_id, file_url, status, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.shopNoticeId}, #{entity.fileUrl}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update shop_notice_id = values(shop_notice_id), file_url = values(file_url), status = values(status), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
